action.reasoning: Observation: mean_r2=-31678 because zero_mask only has 10 features masked (threshold=-1.0 too permissive), while iter 4 had 20 masked features and got 0.5206. The ptend_q features with val R² between -1 and 0 still cause catastrophic test R². Analysis: No need to retrain - the model weights are good (val_loss=0.003295). Just need a more aggressive zero_mask. Decision: Write a script to recompute zero_mask with threshold=0.0 from the current best checkpoint, save updated checkpoint, then submit eval.
